text:
is a song by Yoko Takahashi. It was released as the Welcome to the stage! (single) single. It is the part of the GODZILLA vs EVANGELION collaboration. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=BtDW8XnkOho 

Lyrics

{| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center" width="100%"
!Romaji
!English
!Original
|-
| width="33%" | 
Where to do the tears of the blue sky go?
Your now passes and wanders about
Shadows flutter at the mercy of the sound
The shining town's silent world

A land of death
My destruction
will disappear
tomorrow
The peaceful
hometown
obstructing, the sun rises

A life awakening and alive in an instant....

Feeling and praying, a single tear
Your fingers trace the shadows
Stationery I wrote with Mother and then erased

Where to do the tears of the blue sky go?
For that day we'll meet sometime
Passing, my world's in sight
 
| width="33%" | 
Aoi sora no namida izuko e
Kimi no ima wa nagare samayou
Kage wa nabiku oto no ma ni ma ni
Hikaru machi no shizuka na sekai

Shi no kuni
Hakai wa
Ashita ni
Kie yuku
Yasuragu
Fu ru sa to
Saegiri hi izuru

Mezame ikiru inochi setsuna ni....

Omoi inoru namida hitotsubu 
Kage wo nazoru kimi no yubisaki 
Haha to kaite keshita binsen 
 
Aoi, sora no, namida, izuko e
Itsuka deau sono hi no tame ni
Nagare mieta watashi no sekai

 
| width="33%" | 
蒼い空の涙 何処へ
君の今は 流れ彷徨う
影は靡く 音の間に間に
光る街の静かな世界
死の国
破壊は
明日に
消え行く
安らぐ
フルサト
遮り 日出る
目覚め生きる命 刹那に
憶い 祈る涙 一粒
影をなぞる君の 指先
母と書いて消した 便箋
蒼い空の涙 何処へ
いつか出逢うその日の為に
流れ観えた私の世界
 
|-
|Backing Vocals: Line 16
But I must,
Carry on,
Nothing Worse
Can befall!
|Backing Vocals: Line 16
But I must,
Carry on,
Nothing Worse
Can befall!
|
|}
 https://shinitakashi.blogspot.com/2017/03/takahashi-youko-who-will-know-furusato.html?m=1 

Staff

Composition: Shirō Sagisu
Lyrics: Mike Wyzgowsky, Yoko Takahashi
Arrangements: Shirō Sagisu
Vocals: Yoko Takahashi

Discography

2017: Welcome to the stage! (single)
2017: Shin Godzilla vs. Evangelion Symphony
